_publications._publicationTitle: Cognitive dysfunction in NF1 knock-out mice may result from altered vesicular trafficking of APP/DRD3 complex.

_contextSnippet: Gene expression analysis shows a 2.7 fold increase in the expression of dopamine 3 receptor in Nf1 +/- brains at post natal day 15
details: 2.7 fold increase in dopamine 3 receptor expression in brains at postnatal day 15
